definition: A tangible object as the object-side correlate of body contact.
notes: The project prefers tangible because it is concise and works naturally in the standard sense-base formulas. Touchable is acceptable when the English line benefits from something more plainly adjectival or less technical.

context_rules.context: In most analytical and source-facing contexts
In explanatory prose where a plainer adjective is helpful

example_phrases.notes: Object-side term in standard sense-base formulas.
